descriptions: Game board shows completely different game state
The preview board's grid-hole layout, marbles, and color rings are completely different from the reference design.
Marble positions/arrangement differ significantly from reference layout
The vertical connection line linking the board to the level nodes is missing its wooden track design.
Board layout and ball arrangement completely different from reference; grid of pegs/balls replaced with scattered balls and a hint path overlay
The game board puzzle configuration, marble colors/positions, and launcher positions do not match the reference.
Hand/finger pointer overlay on game board
Extra hint path visualization and hand cursor icon not present in reference
A tutorial overlay with a dark mask, spotlight, and hand cursor is present on the screen.
Game board background color different
Overall background color scheme is darker/desaturated compared to reference
The background and UI elements are heavily dimmed.
Hearts color slightly different
Top hearts bar and settings button are darker teal/blue instead of bright cyan
RESET PROGRESS text/button is missing
Reset Progress link is missing
The 'RESET PROGRESS' action link is completely missing from the bottom of the dialog.
Close button text capitalization differs
Close button text style differs
The main action button text 'Close' uses incorrect casing, font, and size.
Label text color differs
Toggle switches have incorrect green gradient and knob colors.
Coin counter shows wrong value
Level number differs from reference
The text content for the level and coin values differs.
Completion dialog positioned differently
Overall vertical layout/positioning of elements shifted; card is higher and smaller, leaving large empty space below
The card background behind the green banner has a flat, cut-off top edge instead of being cleanly rounded and masked/hidden behind the banner.
Background elements visibility differs
Wooden shelf background behind card is faded/less vibrant and partially cut off
The wooden panel illustration in the background is smaller and darker.
Reward card and banner are significantly smaller than reference and card is not fully visible/cropped
The top-right coin counter capsule button is horizontally squished and smaller.

states.reason: reference skipped by refs manifest at-rest:false: refs/captures/android-basegamelab/fail-ref.png - contains a mid-load LOADING button and is not a stable fail screen; recapture: recapture after human or scripted play reaches the settled fail overlay; keep excluded from verify-device judging until then

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 75% · 0 pass, 4 fail, 1 unscored, 1 skipped (floor 85%)
